positive: A sophisticated, stylized floral wreath composed of geometric and organic elements, featuring stylized hummingbirds suspended within the petals and intertwined vines. The design should utilize a limited, complementary color palette of deep emerald green, dusty rose blush, and rich gold foil accents, creating a striking central mandala-like composition. High contrast silhouette against a neutral background, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Clean linework, vector art style, symmetrical, highly detailed, elegant tattoo flash aesthetic.
